name: Ranch Round Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the round steak to be half an inch thick.
2. Divide the flour, dry mustard, pepper, shortening, and Worcestershire sauce evenly over the steak.
3. Mix all ingredients together.
4. Coat the steak with the mixture thoroughly.
5. Let it marinate for at least 30 minutes or overnight.
6. Turn off heat before serving.
